name: Power Blue Ember
description: Power Blue Ember is a scrapped variant of Ember intended for the Power Blue special edition line.
biography: Power Blue Ember was planned as a special variant for the Power Blue series, a partnership between Activision and Autism Speaks. Like other Power Blue Skylanders, she would have featured a distinct blue and white color scheme. However, the variant was never officially released and remains a piece of cut content from Skylanders: Imaginators.
personality: Determined and disciplined, Ember is a master of the dual blades who treats her role as a Sensei with the utmost respect and focus.

story.content: Power Blue Ember was discovered through game files and prototype images. She was intended to represent the Samurai Class in the Power Blue lineup.

trivia: She is one of the few scrapped Sensei variants known to exist.
The Power Blue line was created to support autism awareness.
Her design replaces her usual red and gold armor with blue and white.
gameplay: As a Samurai Sensei, Power Blue Ember would have utilized dual-wielding katana attacks, fire geysers, and explosive dash moves to control the battlefield.
